violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. PIC to call for service. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. Inspector provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
